creator: tundra@tundraware.com
text:
It's always sumtin'.  Minor fix takes us to v 1.99:

diff -urN abck/Makefile /usr/ports/sysutils/abck/Makefile
--- abck/Makefile       Fri Jul 27 03:05:28 2001
+++ /usr/ports/sysutils/abck/Makefile   Fri Jul 27 03:06:09 2001
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=      abck
-PORTVERSION=   1.98
+PORTVERSION=   1.99
 CATEGORIES=    sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=  http://www.tundraware.com/Software/abck/
 
diff -urN abck/distinfo /usr/ports/sysutils/abck/distinfo
--- abck/distinfo       Fri Jul 27 03:05:28 2001
+++ /usr/ports/sysutils/abck/distinfo   Fri Jul 27 03:06:34 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (abck-1.98.tar.gz) = 507344cfdc17093d47c620ab32e3a21f
+MD5 (abck-1.99.tar.gz) = b80e8dcf0792396871df4c89247bbbba


-- 
------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Tim Daneliuk
tundra@tundraware.com
